notes:
hấp dẫn = attractive, appealing, interesting in a way that makes you want it or pay attention.

It’s an adjective. You use it to describe things that catch your interest: food, movies, jobs, people, ideas, offers. It often goes after rất / quá / khá to add intensity.

It can mean both “visually attractive” and “mentally engaging” (interesting, compelling).  

Close words: thu hút (more like “attract/attractive” in a pulling sense), lôi cuốn (deeply captivating). Opposite idea: nhàm chán (boring).

definitions.en: Attractive or appealing; capable of arousing interest.
definitions.vi: Hấp dẫn; có khả năng thu hút sự chú ý.
definitions.es: Atractivo o atractivo; capaz de despertar interés.

example.vi: Bộ phim này rất hấp dẫn.

exampleSentences: Món ăn này trông rất hấp dẫn, em muốn thử ngay.
Chị thấy công việc mới của anh rất hấp dẫn vì có nhiều cơ hội phát triển.
Bộ phim hôm qua hấp dẫn đến mức anh không thể rời mắt.
notes_md:
**hấp dẫn** = attractive, appealing, interesting in a way that makes you want it or pay attention.

It’s an adjective. You use it to describe things that catch your interest: food, movies, jobs, people, ideas, offers. It often goes after **rất / quá / khá** to add intensity.

It can mean both “visually attractive” and “mentally engaging” (interesting, compelling).  

Close words: **thu hút** (more like “attract/attractive” in a pulling sense), **lôi cuốn** (deeply captivating). Opposite idea: **nhàm chán** (boring).
exampleSentencesTranslated: This dish looks very attractive, I want to try it right away.
I think your new job is very attractive because it has many opportunities for growth.
The movie yesterday was so attractive that I couldn't take my eyes off it.
